job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job. It can be a job identifier, a group name, a comma-separated list of jobs or groups, or a wildcard expression. You can summarize the bucket results for all anomaly detection jobs by using `_all` or by specifying `*` as the `<job_id>`.

allow_no_match.description: Refer to the description for the `allow_no_match` query parameter.

bucket_span.description: Refer to the description for the `bucket_span` query parameter.

end.description: Refer to the description for the `end` query parameter.

exclude_interim.description: Refer to the description for the `exclude_interim` query parameter.

overall_score.description: Refer to the description for the `overall_score` query parameter.

start.description: Refer to the description for the `start` query parameter.

top_n.description: Refer to the description for the `top_n` query parameter.
